name: rc-s7-ingestion-automation-hardening
rerun_commands:
tmp="$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/article6.rcs7.accept.XXXXXX.yml")" && trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT && printf 'version: 2
methods:
  - id: UNFCCC.Agriculture.AM0073
    version: v01-0
    sector: Agriculture
' > "$tmp" && PATH="$PWD/local-tools/bin:$PATH" SCOPED_INGEST_RUNS=2 SCOPED_INGEST_ENFORCE_IDEMPOTENCY=1 bash scripts/ingest-scoped.sh "$tmp"
